# Copilot instructions for Racketshop.bg

- Build this project as a modern racket sports e-commerce storefront.
- Keep the visual style premium, energetic, and retail-focused.
- Prioritize product discovery, category browsing, and conversion-oriented layouts.
- Treat tennis, squash, badminton, padel, racketball, and table tennis as first-class categories.
- Use concise, practical copy that can be expanded later with real catalog content.
- Keep implementation TypeScript-first and responsive for desktop and mobile.
